query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: resolve Trondheim municipality name to kommunenummer and boundary geometry

2.description: fetch high-risk quick-clay hazard areas filtered by municipality boundary

4.description: identify buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay areas

5.description: compute municipality centroid from step 1 boundary

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid
